description: Product page layout — gallery and info arrangement

standard.label: Standard 50/50
standard.description: Equal two-column layout. Gallery left (carousel), product info right. Description/reviews below as full-width sections.

masonry.label: Masonry Gallery + Slim Sidebar
masonry.description: Wide masonry image grid left (~65%), slim product info right (~35%). Description/reviews/related as accordion below the sidebar.
